title: Spicy Juicy Jamaican Palm-Sugar Stir-Fry
description: A spicy and juicy hangover-curing dish featuring palm sugar, perfectly suited for a quick breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: 1 cup shredded green papaya (tropical fruit, not to be confused with the tree)
Juice of 2 limes or orange juice
1 tsp chili powder (or more for extra heat, up to 3-5 tsp)

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the shredded green papaya, stir-fry for about 5 minutes or until just tender but still crisp.
Reduce heat to medium and add onion, cooking until translucent (about 4-5 minutes).
Pour in the palm sugar and lime juice. Stir constantly to prevent burning.
Season with chili powder and salt. Continue stirring to combine all ingredients.
Serve hot as a quick snack or breakfast accompaniment.
